subject: Seviper, a large dark serpentine creature with yellow markings coiled in a dynamic pose
description: A large dark-bodied snake creature with vivid yellow and red markings coils in an aggressive, dynamic pose. The figure has a wide open mouth exposing red fangs, yellow hexagonal or diamond-shaped markings along its body, and a prominently blade-like tail raised high. Around it, motion lines radiate outward and the dark background is filled with swirling energy suggesting a battle or attack in progress. The palette is deep dark blue-black, yellow, and red with glowing accents.
foreground: large coiled dark serpent with yellow markings, open mouth, blade-like tail raised
background: dark swirling atmosphere with energy motion lines
